subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! The Divine Lote-Tree beareth witness that thou didst turn thyself unto it and didst endure tribulations in its path until thou didst enter therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی شهدت السدره بانک اقبلت الیها و حملت الشدائد فی سبیلها الی ان دخلت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
